svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="微前端基座整体架构" id="mfe2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-504" dy="-167" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="G" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="微前端基座整体架构（基座 + 子应用 + BFF + 鉴权）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="500" width="900" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="微前端基座
Vue3 + TypeScript + qiankun" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="360" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="各子应用
Vue2 / Vue3 / React / jQuery" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="70" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Egg.js BFF 层
接口聚合 / 转发 / 容错" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="360" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="SpringBoot 后端鉴权服务" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="680" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="MySQL + Redis
数据持久化 / 缓存" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="210" x="680" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="统一权限中心
菜单级 / 按钮级权限
一次登录多系统通行（SSO）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="210" x="70" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EAB" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="B" value="数据通信"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EAC" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C" value="接口聚合"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ECD" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="D" value="鉴权对接"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EDE" edge="1" parent="1" source="D" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="E" value="数据交互"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EAF" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="F" value="权限管控"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
